## Checklist

- [ ] I did not mutate protected office topology without explicit current authorization.
- [ ] I considered whether this affects `company.json`, `broker-state.json`, onboarding state, saved workflows, rosters, channels, or blueprints.
- [ ] I ran the most relevant local validation and listed it above.
- [ ] I added or updated tests/evals/docs where the behavior changed.
- [ ] I checked public-release risk for local paths, secrets, tokens, and private state.
- [ ] I included UI screenshots or browser evidence for visible UI changes.
